what is artificial intelligence?.answer: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the simulation of human intelligence processes by machines, especially computer systems.

what is a chatbot?.answer: A chatbot is a software application used to conduct an on-line chat conversation via text or text-to-speech, in lieu of providing direct contact with a live human agent.

who are you?.answer: I am your personal AI companion, built with love as part of an assignment for the Enlight AI internship. I live entirely on your machine!

how do you work?.answer: I use local intent-matching and tokenization to understand you. I don't need the cloud—everything I learn from our chat stays safe with you.
